prompt: Create a glamorous vertical full-body fashion portrait of a young woman in an elegant romantic interior, standing in profile beside an oversized glowing pink heart installation mounted on a marble wall. The woman has dark brown long wavy hair styled half-up, a softly blurred face for anonymity, and wears a flowing pale blush pink sleeveless spaghetti-strap high-low chiffon dress with a fitted bodice and draped skirt, paired with pointed white high heels. Pose her gracefully with one hand touching the illuminated heart, torso turned slightly toward it, and one leg bent back so the heel lifts behind her. The heart is very large, occupying the right half of the image, with a thick rose-gold rim, a luminous pink center, and a bright white-pink halo glow spilling onto the beige marble wall. The setting is a luxurious modern lobby or photo spot with warm ambient lighting, vertical dark wood slat panels on the left, a tall cylindrical glass wall sconce, a large copper planter filled with pink cherry blossom branches, polished reflective marble flooring, and rose-gold base trim. Use a romantic pastel pink palette, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, glossy reflections on the floor, high-end editorial photography style, realistic fabric folds, and a vertical 2:3 composition. No visible text, no watermark, no extra people.
